Screenshot showing that audio inputs are picked up only from the language that is defined as part of the pre-configured listener. (for example, caller speaks English while the pre-configured listener is for Hindi)
Screenshot showing that a response is shared with the caller if the spoken language is not pre-configured on the ASR. (from configuration)
Screenshot showing the intent creation functionality showing that within each intent, the slots, character and syntax of the input parameters were defined along with the list of prompt questions.

Screenshot of the workflow designer functionality showing that the workflow was designed so as to ensure that additional information was requested from the caller through pre-configured prompts until the intent was accurately identified.
Screenshot showing the NLU Threshold configured for the platform.
Screenshot from console showing additional prompts can be defined by business users in order to request for additional information for scenarios where the NLU confidence threshold was not met.
Redaction workload within Kubernetes pods showing the redaction service is configured.
For a sample of customers, screenshot showing a conversation where confidential information has been redacted.
Screenshot showing the business rules configured containing the confidential data elements that are to be redacted.
Screenshot showing the option to add more rules for business specific redaction.
Screenshot from code layer which shows that the call is disconnected and transferred to a human agent if the caller's intent cannot be established and the right workflow cannot be identified.
Screenshot from code layer showing the maximum number of unsuccessful attempts before the call is transferred.
Screenshot from code layer showing the response shared to the caller prior to the call being transferred.
Screenshot from code layer which shows that the call is disconnected and transferred to a human agent if the caller's intent cannot be established and the right workflow cannot be identified.
Screenshot from code layer showing the maximum number of unsuccessful attempts before the call is transferred.
Screenshot from code layer showing the response shared to the caller prior to the call being transferred.

Screenshot which shows that error reports are generated and available for review by the customers for processing errors. (eg: if the ASR/TTS/NLU Wrapper services are unable to process inputs due to which the data flow is disrupted)
